botReply:
🩺 Possible Conditions:
Viral Fever, Influenza, Malaria, Typhoid

💊 Prevention Tips:
Stay hydrated. Avoid cold water. Rest well. Take paracetamol if needed.

🍲 Diet Advice:
Warm soups, coconut water, khichdi, tulsi tea, fruits like oranges.

🚨 Red Flags:
Fever above 103°F, fits/seizures, severe headache, rash — see doctor immediately.

🩺 Possible Conditions:
Conjunctivitis, Eye Strain, Dry Eyes, Allergic Conjunctivitis

💊 Prevention Tips:
Avoid rubbing eyes. Take screen breaks. Wear sunglasses outdoors.

🍲 Diet Advice:
Vitamin A rich food: carrots, spinach, eggs, dairy.

🚨 Red Flags:
Sudden vision loss, severe eye pain, eye injury — ophthalmologist immediately.

🩺 Possible Conditions:
Viral Fever, Influenza, Malaria, Typhoid, Dengue, COVID-19

💊 Prevention Tips:
Stay hydrated with ORS or water. Rest in a cool room. Use wet cloth on forehead. Take paracetamol for high fever. Avoid self-medicating antibiotics.

🍲 Diet Advice:
Warm soups, coconut water, khichdi, tulsi-ginger tea, barley water, orange juice, light dal-rice. Avoid oily/spicy food.

🚨 Red Flags:
Fever above 103°F (39.4°C), convulsions/fits, stiff neck, severe headache, rash with fever, no urine for 8+ hours — seek emergency care.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This is AI-generated health information for educational purposes. Always consult a qualified doctor for actual diagnosis and treatment.

🩺 Possible Conditions:
Viral Gastroenteritis, Food Poisoning, IBS, Traveller's Diarrhea, Cholera

💊 Prevention Tips:
Drink clean water. Wash hands before meals. Avoid street food. ORS to prevent dehydration.

🍲 Diet Advice:
BRAT diet: Banana, Rice, Applesauce, Toast. ORS, curd, boiled vegetables. Avoid dairy (except curd), caffeine.

🚨 Red Flags:
>6 loose motions/day, blood/mucus in stool, high fever, signs of dehydration (sunken eyes, no urine) — doctor urgently.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This is AI-generated health information for educational purposes. Always consult a qualified doctor for actual diagnosis and treatment.

🩺 Possible Conditions:
Common Cold, Viral Upper Respiratory Infection, Allergic Rhinitis, Sinusitis

💊 Prevention Tips:
Steam inhalation. Avoid cold drinks/ice cream. Cover mouth when coughing. Warm saline gargle.

🍲 Diet Advice:
Honey-ginger tea, turmeric milk, warm water with lemon, tulsi tea, light dal-rice. Avoid dairy in excess.

🚨 Red Flags:
Cough with blood, breathlessness, high fever >3 days, green/yellow thick mucus with facial pain — see doctor.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This is AI-generated health information for educational purposes. Always consult a qualified doctor for actual diagnosis and treatment.
